login.title: Sign in to CyberStrikeAI
login.subtitle: Enter the access password from config

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.ctaSub: Describe your target in chat, AI will assist with scanning and vulnerability analysis

chat.inputPlaceholder: Enter target or command... (type @ to select tools | Shift+Enter newline, Enter send)
chat.waitingAttachmentsUpload: Waiting for attachments to finish uploading…
chat.attachmentsUploadIncomplete: Some attachments failed to upload. Remove the failed items or pick files again before sending.
chat.noProcessDetail: No process details (execution may be too fast or no detailed events)
chat.deleteTurnConfirm: Delete this entire turn (user message and assistant reply)? This cannot be undone. The next reply will use only the remaining messages; saved context snapshots will be cleared.
chat.emptyGroupConversations: This group has no conversations yet.
chat.deleteGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? Conversations in the group will not be deleted, but will be removed from the group.
chat.deleteConversationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
chat.viewAttackChainSelectConv: Please select a conversation to view attack chain
chat.viewAttackChainCurrentConv: View attack chain of current conversation
chat.systemReadyMessage: System is ready. Please enter your test requirements, and the system will automatically perform the corresponding security tests.
chat.streamNetworkErrorHint: Connection lost ({{detail}}). A long task may still be running on the server; check running tasks at the top or refresh this conversation later.
chat.copyFailedManual: Copy failed, please select and copy manually
chat.agentModeSingleHint: Single-model ReAct loop for chat and tool use
chat.agentModeMultiHint: Eino DeepAgent with sub-agents for complex tasks

progress.lastIterSummary: Last iteration: generating summary and next steps...
progress.analyzingRequestPlanning: Analyzing your request and planning test strategy...

tasks.title: Task Management
tasks.historyHint: Tip: Completed task history available. Check "Show history" to view.
tasks.taskInfoNotSynced: Task info not synced yet, please try again later.
tasks.createBatchQueueFailed: Failed to create batch task queue
tasks.noBatchQueues: Currently there are no batch task queues
tasks.cronRoundDoneProgressHint: Cron queue: subtasks finished; next round starts on schedule
tasks.cronRunningProgressHint: This round is running; the next full cycle follows Cron / next run time
tasks.cronPendingProgressNote: Will start on schedule, or click Start to run a round now
tasks.cronRecurringCallout: Cron queues start a new round at each scheduled time. Turn off "Allow Cron auto-run" to stop looping.
tasks.pauseQueueConfirm: Pause this batch queue? The current task will be stopped; remaining tasks will stay pending.
tasks.deleteQueueConfirm: Delete this batch queue? This cannot be undone.
tasks.rerunQueueConfirm: Rerun this batch queue? All tasks will be reset to pending and re-executed.

infoCollect.parseToFofa: Parse natural language to FOFA query
infoCollect.parseResultEmpty: Parse result empty: Please add/modify FOFA query in popup
infoCollect.sendToChat: Send to chat (editable; Ctrl/Cmd+click to send directly)
infoCollect.cannotInferTarget: Cannot infer scan target from row (include host/ip/port/domain in fields)
infoCollect.noSendMessage: sendMessage() not found, please refresh and retry
infoCollect.filledToInput: Filled to chat input, edit and send
infoCollect.xlsxNotLoaded: XLSX library not loaded, please refresh and retry
infoCollect.noScanTarget: No scan targets inferred from selection (include host/ip/port/domain in fields)
infoCollect.parseSlow: AI parse is taking a while, still processing…
infoCollect.confirmBeforeQuery: Confirm syntax and scope before running the query.
infoCollect.queueCreatedSkipped: Queue created ({{n}} rows skipped, no target)

webshell.title: WebShell Management
webshell.noConnections: No connections. Click "Add connection" to add one.
webshell.selectOrAdd: Select a connection from the list or add a new WebShell connection.
webshell.cmdParamPlaceholder: Leave empty for cmd; e.g. xxx for xxx=command
webshell.dbNoConn: Please select a WebShell connection first
webshell.dbRunning: Database command is running, please wait
webshell.dbCliHint: If command not found appears, install mysql/psql/sqlite3/sqlcmd on the target host first
webshell.dbNoSchema: No schema yet, click Load Schema
webshell.dbSelectTableHint: Click a table to expand columns and generate SQL
webshell.aiSystemReadyMessage: System is ready. Please enter your test requirements, and the system will automatically perform the corresponding security tests.
webshell.aiPlaceholder: e.g. List files in the current directory
webshell.aiMemoPlaceholder: Save key commands, testing ideas, and repro steps...
webshell.terminalWelcome: WebShell virtual terminal — type a command and press Enter (Ctrl+L clear)
webshell.testNoExpectedOutput: Shell responded but expected output was not found. Check password and command parameter name.
webshell.waitFinish: Please wait for the current command to finish

mcp.loadToolsTimeout: Tools load timeout. External MCP may be slow. Click Refresh to retry or check connection.
mcp.configMustBeObject: Config error: Must be JSON object with name as key
mcp.configNeedOne: Config error: At least one config item required
mcp.configNameEmpty: Config error: Name cannot be empty
mcp.configNeedCommand: Config error: "{{name}}" needs command (stdio) or url (http/sse)
mcp.configStdioNeedCommand: Config error: "{{name}}" stdio mode needs command
mcp.configHttpNeedUrl: Config error: "{{name}}" http mode needs url
mcp.configSseNeedUrl: Config error: "{{name}}" sse mode needs url
mcp.configEditMustContainName: Config error: In edit mode, JSON must contain config name "{{name}}"
mcp.connectionFailedCheck: Connection failed. Check config and network.
mcp.connectionTimeout: Connection timeout. Check config and network.

dingtalk.streamHint: Enable bot capability and configure streaming access in the open platform.

apply.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields (marked with *)

security.fillPasswordHint: Fill current and new password correctly. New password at least 8 characters, must match twice.

auth.sessionExpired: Session expired, please sign in again
auth.loginFailedCheck: Sign-in failed, please check the password

knowledge.notEnabledHint: Please go to system settings to enable knowledge retrieval.

roles.title: Role Management
roles.defaultRoleDescription: Default role, no extra user prompt, uses default MCP

skills.title: Skills Management
skills.noSkills: No skills. Click "Create Skill" to add first.
skills.loadStatsFailed: Failed to load skills monitor data
skills.clearStatsConfirm: Clear all Skills statistics? This cannot be undone.
skills.loadFullFailed: Failed to load full skill body
skills.nameInvalid: Use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only (Agent Skills name rules)
skills.descriptionRequired: Description is required (written to SKILL.md front matter)
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete skill "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
skills.deleteConfirmWithRoles:
Are you sure you want to delete skill "{{name}}"?

⚠️ This skill is currently bound to {{count}} role(s):
{{roles}}

After deletion, the system will automatically remove this skill from those roles.

This cannot be undone. Continue?
skills.deleteSuccessWithRoles: Skill deleted and automatically removed from {{count}} role(s): {{roles}}

apiDocs.title: API Docs
apiDocs.subtitle: CyberStrikeAI platform API documentation with online testing
apiDocs.authAllNeedToken: All API endpoints require Token authentication.
apiDocs.authGetTokenDesc: After logging in on the frontend, the Token is saved automatically. You can also get it via:
apiDocs.authTip: 💡 This page will use your logged-in Token automatically; no need to fill it manually.
apiDocs.tokenDetected: ✓ Token detected - You can test API endpoints directly
apiDocs.tokenNotDetected: ⚠ No Token detected - Please log in on the frontend first, then refresh this page. When testing, add Authorization: Bearer token in the request header
apiDocs.errorLoginRequired: Login required to view API docs. Please log in on the frontend first, then refresh this page.
apiDocs.noEndpointsInGroup: No API endpoints in this group
apiDocs.errorTokenRequired: No Token detected. Please log in on the frontend and refresh, or add Authorization: Bearer your_token in the request header
apiDocs.requestBodyPlaceholder: Enter request body in JSON format

summary.sendMessageNonStream: Send message and get AI reply (non-stream)
summary.sendMessageStream: Send message and get AI reply (stream)

response.badRequestGroupNameExists: Bad request or group name already exists
response.badRequestConfig: Bad request (e.g. invalid config or missing required fields)

mcpMonitor.deleteExecConfirmSingle: Are you sure you want to delete this execution record? This cannot be undone.
mcpMonitor.selectExecFirst: Please select execution record(s) to delete first
mcpMonitor.batchDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {{count}} execution record(s)? This cannot be undone.

infoCollectPage.title: Recon
infoCollectPage.formHint: See FOFA docs for query syntax; supports && / || / ().
infoCollectPage.parseHint: Result will open in a popup for editing before running the query.
infoCollectPage.parseBtnTitle: Parse natural language to FOFA query
infoCollectPage.nlPlaceholder: e.g. Apache sites in Missouri, US, title contains Home
infoCollectPage.batchScanTitle: Create batch task queue from selected rows

chatFilesPage.title: File Management
chatFilesPage.intro: Files uploaded in chat appear here. Click “Copy path” to copy the server absolute path and paste it into a conversation so the model can reference the file.
chatFilesPage.folderPathCopied: Folder path copied — paste into chat if needed
chatFilesPage.confirmDeleteFolder: Delete this folder and everything inside it? This cannot be undone.
chatFilesPage.folderRemovedStale: That folder is not on the server anymore; list refreshed.
chatFilesPage.mkdirExists: A file or folder with that name already exists
chatFilesPage.mkdirInvalidName: Invalid name: cannot be empty or contain /, \, or use . or ..
chatFilesPage.copyPathTitle: Copy the absolute path on the server; paste into chat to reference this file
chatFilesPage.pathCopied: Path copied — paste it into chat
chatFilesPage.uploadOkHint: Uploaded. Use “Copy path” to copy the absolute path.
chatFilesPage.moreActions: More: open chat, edit, rename, delete
chatFilesPage.editBinaryHint: Binary files (images, archives, etc.) cannot be edited as text here. Use Download and open locally.
chatFilesPage.editTooLarge: File exceeds 2MB and cannot be edited here. Download and edit locally.
chatFilesPage.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tasksPage.searchQueuePlaceholder: Search queue ID, title or created time

agentsPage.title: Agent management
agentsPage.hint: Agents are .md files under agents_dir (front matter + body as system prompt). The orchestrator is the Deep coordinator and is not listed as a task sub-agent.
agentsPage.empty: No Markdown sub-agents yet. Click New agent to create one.
agentsPage.roleHint: You can also use the fixed file name orchestrator.md. Only one orchestrator per directory. If the orchestrator body is empty, config orchestrator_instruction and Eino defaults apply.
agentsPage.filenameInvalid: File name must end with .md and use only letters, digits, ._-
agentsPage.fieldId: Agent id (optional; derived from name if empty)
agentsPage.descPlaceholder: When the orchestrator should delegate to this agent
agentsPage.fieldTools: Tools (comma-separated; same keys as role tools)
agentsPage.fieldMaxIter: Max sub-agent iterations (0 = use global default)

settingsBasic.maxTotalTokensHint: Shared by memory compression and attack chain building. Default: 120000
settingsBasic.enableMultiAgentHint: After enabling, the chat page can use multi-agent mode; sub-agents are configured in config.yaml under multi_agent.sub_agents.
settingsBasic.multiAgentRobotUse: Use multi-agent for WeCom / DingTalk / Lark bots
settingsBasic.multiAgentRobotUseHint: Requires 'Enable multi-agent' to be checked; usage and cost will be higher.
settingsBasic.multiAgentBatchUse: Use multi-agent for batch task queues
settingsBasic.multiAgentBatchUseHint: When enabled, each sub-task executed by queue in Task Management will run through Eino DeepAgent (requires multi-agent).
settingsBasic.embeddingBaseUrlPlaceholder: Leave empty to use OpenAI base_url
settingsBasic.embeddingApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to use OpenAI api_key
settingsBasic.topKHint: Number of top-K results to return
settingsBasic.similarityHint: Results below this value are filtered (0-1)
settingsBasic.subIndexFilterPlaceholder: e.g. prod, must match an indexing sub_indexes tag
settingsBasic.subIndexFilterHint: Empty = no filter. When set, only rows whose sub_indexes contain this tag (legacy rows with empty sub_indexes still match).
settingsBasic.postRetrieveDedupeAuto: Results are always deduped by normalized text (whitespace-collapsed bodies). No setting required.
settingsBasic.prefetchTopKHint: 0 = same as Top-K; larger values fetch more vector hits before dedupe/truncate (max 200).
settingsBasic.maxContextCharsHint: 0 = unlimited; keeps whole chunks in rank order until the budget is exceeded.
settingsBasic.maxContextTokensHint: 0 = unlimited; tiktoken estimate (embedding model name, fallback cl100k_base).
settingsBasic.chunkStrategyHint: Matches Eino-style pipelines: Markdown headers + recursive for docs; plain text can use recursive only.
settingsBasic.requestTimeoutHint: 0 uses the default 120s embedding HTTP client timeout.
settingsBasic.batchSizeHint: Max texts per embedding request (SQLite indexer batches writes accordingly).
settingsBasic.preferSourceFile: Prefer on-disk source file when indexing (Eino FileLoader)
settingsBasic.preferSourceFileHint: When enabled, content comes from file_path; falls back to DB content if load fails.
settingsBasic.subIndexesHint: Passed to indexer.WithSubIndexes; stored in the sub_indexes column.
settingsBasic.maxChunksHint: Max chunks per knowledge item (0 = no limit)
settingsBasic.maxRpmHint: Max requests per minute (0 = no limit)
settingsBasic.maxRetriesHint: Retries on rate limit or server error
settingsBasic.testFillRequired: Please fill in API Key and Model first

settingsTerminal.title: Terminal
settingsTerminal.description: Run commands on the server for ops and debugging. Commands run on the server; avoid sensitive or destructive operations.
settingsTerminal.welcomeLine: CyberStrikeAI Terminal — real shell session; type commands directly. Ctrl+L to clear screen
settingsTerminal.xtermNotLoaded: xterm.js failed to load. Refresh the page or check your network.

settingsSecurity.changePasswordDesc: After changing password, sign in again with the new password.

settingsRobotsExtra.botCommandsDesc: You can send the following commands in chat (Chinese and English supported):
settingsRobotsExtra.botCommandsFooter: Otherwise, send any text for AI penetration testing / security analysis.

mcpDetailModal.title: Tool call details
mcpDetailModal.execSuccessNoContent: Execution succeeded with no displayable content.

externalMcpModal.formatDesc: JSON object; key = config name, value = config. Use Start/Stop buttons to control state.

skillModal.skillNameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens (Agent Skills name)
skillModal.descriptionHint: Maps to the description field in SKILL.md YAML (when creating/editing SKILL.md)
skillModal.newFilePlaceholder: Relative path, e.g. FORMS.md or scripts/extra.sh
skillModal.newFilePathRequired: Enter a path for the new file
skillModal.unsavedSwitch: You have unsaved changes. Switch file anyway?
skillModal.contentPlaceholderAdd: SKILL.md body only (front matter is generated)…
skillModal.bodyHintEdit: For SKILL.md this is the body only (no --- header); save merges with name/description into standard SKILL.md.
skillModal.contentHintAdd: Creates standard SKILL.md (YAML front matter + body). Drop open-source skill folders into skills/ as-is.

batchManageModal.title: Manage conversations · {{count}} total
batchManageModal.confirmDeleteNone: Please select at least one conversation to delete

createGroupModal.title: Create group
createGroupModal.nameExists: Group name already exists, please use another name.

batchImportModal.title: New task
batchImportModal.queueTitlePlaceholder: Enter queue title (optional, for identification and filtering)
batchImportModal.queueTitleHint: Set a title for the batch task queue to make it easier to find and manage later.
batchImportModal.roleHint: Select a role; all tasks will be executed using that role's configuration (prompt and tools).
batchImportModal.agentModeHint: Single-agent is recommended by default; use multi-agent for complex tasks (requires system multi-agent enabled).
batchImportModal.scheduleModeHint: Manual is for one-time runs; Cron is for recurring runs. Validate tasks manually first.
batchImportModal.cronExprHint: Use standard 5-field Cron: minute hour day month weekday. Example: `0 2 * * *` runs at 02:00 daily.
batchImportModal.cronExprRequired: Please fill in a Cron expression when Cron schedule is selected
batchImportModal.cronExprInvalid: Invalid Cron expression format. Must have 5 fields (minute hour day month weekday), e.g.: 0 */2 * * *
batchImportModal.executeNowHint: Default is off. When disabled, the queue stays pending and can be started manually later.
batchImportModal.tasksListPlaceholder: Enter task list, one per line
batchImportModal.tasksListPlaceholderExample:
Enter task list, one per line, for example:
Scan open ports of 192.168.1.1
Check if https://example.com has SQL injection
Enumerate subdomains of example.com
batchImportModal.tasksListHint: Enter one task command per line; the system will execute them in order. Empty lines are ignored.
batchImportModal.tasksListHintFull: Hint: Enter one task command per line; the system will execute these tasks in order. Empty lines are ignored.

batchQueueDetailModal.title: Batch queue details
batchQueueDetailModal.startExecuteNowConfirm: This is a Cron queue. Clicking Start will run the current round immediately instead of waiting for the next Cron time. Continue?
batchQueueDetailModal.scheduleCronAutoHint: When off, the cron expression is kept but the queue will not run on schedule; use Start to run manually.

roleModal.userPromptHint: This prompt is appended before user message to guide AI. It does not change system prompt.
roleModal.defaultRoleToolsDesc: Default role uses all tools enabled in MCP Management.
roleModal.relatedToolsHint: Select tools to link; empty = use all from MCP Management.
roleModal.relatedSkillsHint: Selected skills are injected into system prompt before task execution.
roleModal.firstRoleNoToolsHint: First role with no tools selected will use all tools by default.
roleModal.currentPageSelectedTitle: Selected on current page (enabled tools only)
roleModal.totalSelectedTitle: Total tools linked to this role
